_provenance: Hand-derived from council synthesis §2.2 and plan D1-D3 contracts. S values are plain integers. BHY adjusted p-values are computed by hand from the step-up formula: p_adj_(k) = min_{j>=k}[(N·c(N)/j)·p_(j)], clamp [0,1], where N = n_optuna + S, c(N) = sum_{j=1}^{N} 1/j. No producer-computed rates/dollars/percents pinned.

nn1_honest_s0._description: T1 — NN1-honest no-op: empty researcher_dof_ledger, S=0, N_effective=N_optuna. Byte-identical to pre-M1 haircut.

single_pnl_toured_facet._description: T2 — tripwire fires: one BACKTEST_SELECTION row with n_configs_searched=3, S=3, N_effective=503.

ledger_rows._note: spec_bundle_id differs from winning bundle so it is NOT excluded

defect2_subsweep_counting._description: T3 — Defect-2: one row with n_configs_searched=7. S must be 7 (SUM), not 1 (COUNT). N_effective=507.

ledger_rows._note: Full sub-sweep count contributes to S, not just presence of the row

frozen_eval_tainted_excluded._description: T4 — touched_frozen_eval=1 rows are excluded from S. Separate OOS_PEEK alarm path; this accounting must not double-fire.

ledger_rows._note: touched_frozen_eval=1 — excluded from S accumulator per plan D4 constraints

winner_bundle_self_excluded._description: T5 — ledger row whose spec_bundle_id matches the winning bundle is excluded (already counted in n_optuna via the sweep that selected it).

ledger_rows._note: Same bundle as winning — excluded to prevent double-count

multiple_rows_sum_not_count._description: Three qualifying rows with n_configs_searched 3, 5, 7. S=15 (SUM), d_spec=3 (COUNT DISTINCT bundles). N_effective=515.

shape_a_padding._description: T6 — Shape-A: benjamini_hochberg_adjust(p + [1.0]*0) == benjamini_hochberg_adjust(p). Empty padding is a no-op.
shape_a_padding._note: S=0 means no padding appended; the call is byte-identical to today's

bhy_tightening_property._description: T7 — Conservative upper-bound property: for any p-vector and S in [0,5], adjusted p-values with S extra 1.0 placeholders are element-wise >= unadjusted. Confirms 'errs safe'.
bhy_tightening_property._rationale: The Yekutieli c(N) factor is strictly increasing in N (adding 1/N+1 > 0). Padding raises N, raises c(N), raises every BHY factor N*c(N)/k, which inflates every adjusted p-value monotonically.
